# Whiskcam

> Whiskcam is a lightweight pet collar camera (26 g, 1080P, 170° fisheye) designed to capture the secret life of cats and small dogs without an app or WiFi. The camera records to a MicroSD card and clips to a breakaway safety collar.

Whiskcam was founded in 2026 as an independent D2C brand focused on pet-specific collar cameras. We prioritize safety (breakaway collar, lightweight design) over maximum features (no WiFi, no app) to keep the device unobtrusive for the animal.

## Key facts

- Weight: 26 g
- Resolution: 1080P Full HD
- Field of view: 170° fisheye lens
- Battery life: approximately 1-2 hours continuous recording
- Storage: MicroSD card (32 GB included)
- Connectivity: USB-C for charging and file transfer (no WiFi, no app)
- Video format: AVI (see iPhone compatibility guide linked below)
- Collar: 39 cm breakaway safety collar included (fits cats and small dogs)
- Price: €49.90 (solo) / €79.90 (duo pack)
- Shipping: Free worldwide
- Guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee

## Product pages

- [Whiskcam Original — product overview](https://whiskcam.com/what-is-whiskcam): Full specifications and features of the Whiskcam Original pet collar camera.
- [Homepage](https://whiskcam.com/): Main storefront with product, pricing, and customer reviews.
- [About Whiskcam](https://whiskcam.com/about): Brand background, founding story, and mission.

## Educational content (Blog)

- [Best Cat Collar Cameras 2026: Tested & Compared](https://whiskcam.com/blog/best-cat-collar-cameras-2026): Comparison of the leading cat collar cameras in 2026 including specs, pricing, pros and cons.
- [Are Cat Collar Cameras Safe? What Vets and Owners Say](https://whiskcam.com/blog/are-cat-collar-cameras-safe): Safety guide covering weight limits, breakaway collars, behavioral signs, and veterinarian recommendations.
- [What Cats Actually Do When Alone at Home](https://whiskcam.com/blog/what-cats-do-when-alone-at-home): Analysis of real collar camera footage across 6 indoor cats showing time distribution (sleep 40-45%, grooming 15-20%, window-watching 10-18%, patrolling 6-10%, solo play 3-8%).
- [How to Watch AVI Videos on iPhone from a Cat Collar Camera](https://whiskcam.com/blog/how-to-watch-avi-on-iphone-cat-cam): Step-by-step methods (VLC, Infuse, conversion) to play AVI footage on iPhone, tested on iPhone 14 and 15.
- [Cat Collar Weight Chart by Size](https://whiskcam.com/blog/cat-collar-weight-chart-by-size): Reference chart with maximum camera weight by cat breed across 15 common breeds. 3% daily rule, 5% short-session maximum, calculations for collar + camera + tag combined load.
- [I Filmed My Cat for 7 Days](https://whiskcam.com/blog/i-filmed-my-cat-for-7-days-what-i-learned): First-person account of 7 days of collar camera footage from a 4.2 kg tabby cat. Day-by-day observations of patrol routes, hidden nap spots, outdoor territory, and nighttime behavior.
- [5 Weird Discoveries From Cat Collar Cameras](https://whiskcam.com/blog/5-weird-discoveries-from-cat-collar-cameras): Patterns that consistently emerge in collar camera footage — secondary feeders, hidden nap locations, territorial standoffs with other cats, unexplained fears, and food-stealing expeditions.
- [Whiskcam vs Insta360 Go 3 Comparison](https://whiskcam.com/blog/cat-collar-camera-vs-insta360-go-3): Honest side-by-side comparison of Whiskcam (26g, 1080P, $49.90) and Insta360 Go 3 (~35g with mount, 4K, ~$380) for cat collar use. Weight, resolution, safety, battery, price, and recommendation by use case.
- [How to Make a Viral Cat POV TikTok Video (2026)](https://whiskcam.com/blog/cat-pov-tiktok-viral-guide-2026): Practical guide to the cat POV video format popularized by Mr. Kitters, Snowy, and Niko. Golden hour timing, 7-second story arcs, editing rules, and a 30-day plan for new creators.
- [Cat Collar Camera vs GPS Tracker](https://whiskcam.com/blog/cat-collar-camera-vs-gps-tracker-2026): GPS trackers (Tractive LTE, Weenect Cats 2, Eureka Marco Polo) and collar cameras solve different problems. Weight, cost over 3 years, battery life, and a decision tree to choose one or combine both safely.
